about_bio: I'm a software developer and designer in Vancouver. I build full-stack web products and interactive experiences—from React and ASP.NET apps to Unity [[xr]] tools. I care about clear UX, accessible code, and getting prototypes in front of users quickly.
about_exp_qwadra_desc: Software development with React, ASP.NET, and C++ MFC. Development of 3D editor, macros, and networking features for Canfit, an [[op]] design app. Combining photogrammetry, [[cnc]] and 3D printing technology.
about_exp_clirio_desc: Cross-platform [[xr]] [[gis]] apps in Unity/C#; MRTK, Blazor, and Three.js.
about_cta: Open to interesting projects — get in touch!
glossary_xr: Extended Reality — VR, AR, and mixed reality
glossary_op: Orthotics & Prosthetics — limb support and replacement devices
glossary_gis: Geographic Information System — mapping and spatial data
glossary_cnc: Computer Numerical Control — automated machine tools for cutting and shaping materials
